intent: AI conversation thread container with message list, welcome screen, Composer input, and scroll control. Core assistant-ui component.

blacklist.description: Do not override styles matching pattern ^overflow
Do not override styles matching pattern ^(animate-|transition-|duration-)
Do not override styles matching pattern ^bg-(background|popover|accent|muted|primary|secondary)
Do not override styles matching pattern ^h-

aiPrompt: Use Thread from @/components/base. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.

forbidden.reason: Do not hand-build chat containers (div+input+message list) instead of using the Thread component

corrections.violation: Violation: using raw tag or hand-built alternative
corrections.fixPrompt: Replace with the proper component import and use semantic props for styling.
